---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new specification or significant addition
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

What problem does this specification solve? What gap in the current documentation exists?

## Proposed Specification

Describe the specification you'd like to see added or modified.

## Why This Matters

Explain the impact this would have on interface design and development.

## Examples

Provide examples of how this specification would be applied.

## Cross-References

Which existing specifications does this relate to?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why were they rejected?

## Additional Context

Any other information that supports this request.
